title: platanthera × erdingeri
intro: Platanthera × erdingeri, also known as Erdinger's orchid, is a hybrid orchid species obtained from the natural crossing of Platanthera clavellata and Platanthera hookeri. The plant is primarily used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Platanthera × erdingeri include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
